name: spec-driven
description: Spec-driven development workflow with structured requirements, design, tasks, and autonomous execution.

interface.shortDescription: Turn feature ideas into requirements, design docs, tasks, and execution loops.
interface.longDescription: A structured spec-driven development workflow for Codex. It guides features through brainstorming, EARS requirements, technical design, task breakdown, validation, execution, and post-completion review.
defaultPrompt: Create a spec for this feature.
